svg.text: Same mark, different planet-lighting strategies. These isolate how far the sphere can go toward depth before it stops feeling like the current brand.

g.text: Soft upper-right bloom with a warmer atmosphere layer. Most cinematic of the four.
Sharper warm-to-cool transition through the equator. Strongest sense of a lit sphere at small sizes.
Adds deeper shadow pockets and heavier internal color pools. Feels premium and slightly less playful.
Pushes a cooler top light and a cleaner highlight cap. Best if you want the planet to feel glossy and modern.
